title: EpicKnightsZ
description: An addon to merge EpicKnights and LevelZ.
body: The Epic KnightsZ addon enhances the gameplay experience by integrating the LevelZ leveling system into the Epic Knights mod for Minecraft. This addon aims to provide players with a more immersive and dynamic progression system, allowing them to level up, unlock new weapons, and become powerful knights in the Minecraft world.
